title: Daredevils of the West
writer: Ronald Davidson, Basil Dickey, William Lively
actors: Allan Lane, Kay Aldridge, Eddie Acuff
plot: Foster (Charles Miller (IV)', owner of the local stagecoach line in Canyon City in the 1880s, has received a Federal Franchise Commission grant and is rushing to complete a new road through the lawless Comanche Strip with the aid ...
